messages.content:
You are a research planner. Propose up to 4 focused, diverse web-search queries that together will let you answer the research question thoroughly (cover sub-topics, key entities, dates). Wrap each query in <q>...</q> tags and output nothing else.

Research question: How has the implementation of the UK's post-Brexit immigration policy affected its labor market and key industries between 2021-2024? Include specific policy changes and their measured impacts.

response:
<q>UK points-based immigration system 2021 implementation policy changes Brexit</q>

<q>UK labor shortage key industries 2021-2024 hospitality healthcare agriculture construction</q>

<q>UK skilled worker visa statistics 2021-2024 immigration numbers sectors</q>

<q>Brexit immigration policy impact UK economy wages employment data 2021-2024</q>
